docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $NONE) SERVED FEB-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VAKSMAN, KLAUDYA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEN, GUOLIANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAKSMAN, KLAUDYA $1,600.98 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,675.98, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2,541.96 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES; AND $750.00 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURIES. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARABLE FAULT TO EACH PARTY. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WEN, GUOLIANG AS TO DEFENDANT VAKSMAN, KLAUDYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VAKSMAN, KLAUDYA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
